javadoc_before:
/**
     * Gets the default time zone.
     * 
     * @return the default datetime zone object
     */
javadoc_after:
/** * Gets the default time zone. *

* The default time zone is derived from the system property {@code user.timezone}. * If that is {@code null} or is not a valid identifier, then the value of the * JDK {@code TimeZone} default is converted. If that fails, {@code UTC} is used. * * @return the default datetime zone object */
